description: 50轮简单对话：碎片化展开用户日常信息，每轮1-2句，测试长上下文事实累积

messages.content: 你好！有什么我可以帮你的吗？
对，我特别想家里的火锅
我妈还在医院上班，她是护士
英语还行吧，能工作交流
日语学了一点，还不太行
我之前在百度干过三年
我有个大学室友叫王磊
他现在在美团当工程师
我们经常一起打羽毛球
好了今天就聊到这吧，拜拜

golden_stl:
@bj: place "北京"
@cd: place "成都"
@bytedance: org "字节跳动"
@sis: person "陈思雨"
@dad: person
@mom: person
@cat: animal "豆豆"
@buaa: org "北航"
@thu: org "清华"
@baidu: org "百度"
@wl: person "王磊"
@meituan: org "美团"
@ly: person "林悦"
@tokyo: place "东京"
@osaka: place "大阪"
$n1 = name(@self, "陈思远")
$a1 = age(@self, 32)
$o1 = occupation(@self, "产品经理")
$w1 = work_at(@self, @bytedance)
$l1 = live_in(@self, @bj)
$l2 = location(@self, "朝阳区")
$l3 = location:hometown(@self, @cd)
$r1 = sister(@self, @sis)
$o2 = occupation(@sis, "老师")
$o2d = note($o2, "教高中数学")
$w2 = live_in(@sis, @cd)
$r2 = father(@self, @dad)
$r3 = mother(@self, @mom)
$ld = live_in(@dad, @cd)
$lm = live_in(@mom, @cd)
$od = occupation(@dad, "退休")
$om = occupation(@mom, "护士")
$wm = work_at:type(@mom, "医院")
$p1 = pet(@self, @cat)
$h1 = hobby(@self, "跑步")
$h1f = frequency($h1, "每周三次")
$h2 = hobby(@self, "看电影")
$h2n = note($h2, "最喜欢科幻片")
$s1 = speak(@self, "中文")
$s2 = speak(@self, "英语")
$s3 = speak(@self, "日语")
$s3d = degree($s3, "一点")
$e1 = study_at(@self, @buaa)
$e1m = education(@self, "计算机")
$e2 = study_at(@self, @thu)
$e2m = education(@self, "MBA")
$pw = work_at(@self, @baidu)
$pwt = time($pw, "三年")
$rm = roommate(@self, @wl)
$wo = occupation(@wl, "工程师")
$ww = work_at(@wl, @meituan)
$hb = hobby:shared(@self, "羽毛球")
$gf = partner(@self, @ly)
$go = occupation(@ly, "设计师")
$gw = work_at:type(@ly, "广告公司")
$mt = meet(@self, @ly)
$mtt = time($mt, "去年")
$dd = dislike(@self, "酒")
$dk = like(@self, "咖啡")
$dkf = frequency($dk, "每天至少两杯")
$tv = visit(@self, @tokyo)
$ov = visit(@self, @osaka)
$tvt = time($tv, "去年")
$pl = plan(@self, "欧洲旅行")
$plt = time($pl, "今年夏天")
